layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose grid borders. Use 1px solid #27272A to separate panels. Avoid shadows.

rules: Use inner borders to define sections.

navigation.style: Fixed top, bg-black, border-b border-zinc-800. Height: 48px to 56px.
navigation.links: text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide text-zinc-400 hover:text-white. Active link gets a 2px bottom border of #FFA500.
navigation.clock: text-[#00FF00] font-mono text-sm border border-[#00FF00]/30 bg-[#00FF00]/10 px-2 py-1 rounded-none

bond_screener_table.data_cells: Use JetBrains Mono. Align numbers right. Use #00FF00 for positive yields, #FF0000 for negative.
bond_screener_table.tags: Rating/Type badges should be square, transparent bg with 1px border. e.g., border-blue-500/50 text-blue-400

filters.layout: Dense horizontal bar above table. gap-3.
filters.inputs: bg-[#0C0C0C] border-zinc-800 rounded-none text-sm focus:border-[#FFA500] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFA500]

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-100 text-black hover:bg-white rounded-none font-semibold text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-none

rules: Hover states must be instantaneous (transition-none or max duration-75).
Simulate the immediate response of a hardware terminal.

accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio for text. Text on pure black is easily accessible.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='yield-slider', data-testid='export-csv-btn').

icons_and_assets.style: Regular or Bold weight, technical/sharp feel.

media.note: No images required for this financial terminal application.

instructions_to_main_agent: Run 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' to install the required icon library.
Update index.css to enforce '--radius: 0' and absolute black '--background: 0 0% 0%'. Adjust standard Shadcn variables to match the terminal look.
Import 'IBM Plex Sans' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.html or index.css.
When building Shadcn components (Table, Select, Slider, Input, Button), modify their root classes to remove 'rounded-md' and replace with 'rounded-none'.
For the Yield Curve Chart, use 'react-apexcharts'. Ensure it auto-refreshes every 60s via a useEffect interval.
For the Bond Screener, create mock data arrays. Implement client-side sorting and pagination.
Use pure green (text-[#00FF00]) and pure red (text-[#FF0000]) only for value changes (up/down). Avoid using them for arbitrary layout elements.
Ensure the Live EST Clock in the navigation updates every second.
File extensions MUST be .js or .jsx, do not generate .tsx files.
